sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73265" key="o(lopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n73265.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">creating the whole,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ζεύς</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4066.tlg003:245" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">245</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
